goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加下一步诊断建议

summary.title: 增加 Catty dogfood health 下一步建议
summary.what: 在 dogfood-health 的只读 readiness 输出里新增 recommendedNext，把每个 blocker 映射成下一步手动命令、意图说明和安全边界；同时补测试锁定空 live store 场景下 no_predictions/no_judgements/no_user_prior_candidates 的建议输出，并更新 src/catty/README.md 说明该入口现在会输出下一步建议。
summary.why: 当前真实 dogfood 仍 blocked：今天没有 prediction/judgement，真实 Pi shadow 又被 envchain/scoped keychain unreadable 阻断。只返回 blockers 会让后续 agent 继续猜下一步；把安全手动命令直接放进 health 输出，可以在不接 heartbeat、不读 secret、不写 user memory 的情况下提高运行态可诊断性。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加下一步诊断建议

decisions.chose: 放进 dogfood-health 的 recommendedNext 字段，而不是只写 README 或新增独立脚本。
decisions.rationale: dogfood-health 已经是 v0 readiness 总览入口；把建议贴到 blocker 输出旁边，后续 agent 可以直接从 live smoke 得到下一步。

decisions.chose: 只输出命令和 safetyBoundary，不自动写 prediction、judgement、canary 或 user memory。
decisions.rationale: v0 仍要求手动显式写入边界，且本轮目标是诊断建议，不是接入调度或真实 writer。

decisions.point: 真实 Pi blocker 怎么处理
decisions.chose: 记录 envchain/scoped keychain unreadable 为运行态 blocker，不在本仓读取或回显 secret，也不修全局 keychain ACL。
decisions.rationale: Catty 代码层 provider alias 已兼容；当前阻断发生在 host/keychain 授权层，越界修复会偏离本轮 Catty v0 小切片。

rejected.alternative: 直接把 shadow/judge 写入接进 heartbeat
rejected.reason: 会引入每分钟模型调用或自动写入风险，违反 v0 当前手动受控边界。

rejected.alternative: 把 prediction/judgement 直接转成 user memory 来解除 blockers
rejected.reason: v0 明确 memory 只能来自可证伪 user prior，并且必须经过 candidate/canary/admission。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts；bun test；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check。
live smoke 通过：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date 2026-05-27 --max 5 输出 recommendedNext，且 safetyBoundary 仍声明不写 user memory、不接 heartbeat、不调模型。
runtime live status 通过：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat ok，observe ok，full pipeline throttled 正常。
真实 Pi dry-run 未进入 Catty：envchain/mom-envchain 在 scoped keychain 取值阶段失败，mom-envchain doctor mom --check-values 只显示 unreadable 元数据；本轮未读取或回显 secret。
提交范围只包含 src/catty/dogfood-health.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/README.md；CLAUDE.md 仍是无关 dirty 文件，未 stage。
Mainline preflight 的历史 proposed overlaps 均为同一 catty 分支上的顺序切片，本轮只补 dogfood-health 诊断输出，不改变 shadow/judge/canary/accepted-memory 协议。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains read-only and side-effect free; it now reports recommended manual next steps alongside blockers.
recommendedNext preserves the existing explicit write boundary by naming commands rather than executing them.
The output keeps prediction, judgement, candidate, canary, and accepted-memory stages distinct instead of collapsing blockers into a generic ready/not-ready state.
behavioral_changes: inspectCattyDogfoodHealth now returns recommendedNext entries for every blocker.
no_predictions recommends the controlled manual shadow write command.
no_judgements recommends the controlled manual judge-record write command.
candidate and canary blockers recommend the matching dry-run or explicit queue-write command with safety notes.
dogfood-health CLI JSON includes recommendedNext in live smoke output.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts outputs recommendedNext in its JSON result

security_implications: No secrets are read, persisted, or printed by dogfood-health recommendations.
Recommendations explicitly preserve manual write boundaries and do not write user memory, canary promotion state, or heartbeat configuration.
The Pi/envchain blocker was diagnosed through metadata-only checks and command failures without exposing secret values.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood-health consumers remain compatible; they receive an additional JSON field.
